ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rally event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the rally event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event was held */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., national, international) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the rally route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the rally route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the driver belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of rally wins */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_drivers" (
  "co_driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the co-driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the co-driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the co-driver belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of co-driving experience */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of rally wins */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_principal" TEXT /* Name of the team principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "co_driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-driver */,
  "class" TEXT /* Race class the team is competing in */,
  "overall_position" INTEGER /* Overall position achieved by the team in the event */,
  "stage_position" INTEGER /* Position in the stage */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties incurred during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_co_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_driver_id") REFERENCES co_drivers ("co_driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rally_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rally class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the rally class (e.g., Open2WD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "engine_capacity" INTEGER /* Engine capacity in cubic centimeters */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., front-wheel drive, all-wheel drive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety protocol */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the safety protocol */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Specific requirements for compliance */,
  "consequences_of_non_compliance" TEXT /* Consequences for non-compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_protocols_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_specs" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., tires, suspension) */,
  "specification" TEXT /* Specifications of the equipment */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_specs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., driver, co-driver, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the participant belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being rated */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, participant, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event sponsored */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., financial, equipment) */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., gold, silver, bronze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_info" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck) */,
  "engine_capacity" INTEGER /* Engine capacity in cubic centimeters */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., front-wheel drive, all-wheel drive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_info_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the penalty was incurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that incurred the penalty */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., time penalty, fine) */,
  "penalty_time" INTEGER /* Time added to the team's overall time due to the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the notification */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., upcoming event, results) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championships" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the championship was won */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver that won the championship */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the championship was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)
